title: Cutting Edge 6x2" Brushes Paintbrush Set - Professional Premium Quality Synthetic Bristle - 2” Size - Ergonomic Beavertail Handle for a Comfortable Grip, SRT Synthetic Fibres, No Breaking-in Required
features: 【6-SET PAINT BRUSHES】Cutting Edge 6-piece 2” paint brush pack. This painting supply package is made from high quality ‘Solid Round Tapered’ (SRT) bristles. The brushes don’t require breaking-in.
【VERSATILE APPLICATION】The paintbrush kit provides a set of the most popular size of paintbrush - 2”. These paintbrushes are a classic combination that can cover large areas.
【ERGONOMIC DESIGN】The paintbrush’s synthetic bristles are attached to the beavertail handle by a stainless-steel ferrule. The wooden handle is designed to fit the palm with utmost levels of comfort.

【CLEAN PAINT JOB】These high-quality brushes allow you to apply an even layer of paint. The brushes offer great precision and smooth sharp lines. When used carefully, these paintbrushes don't require masking tapes to achieve sharp lines
【SIMPLE TO USE】The brushes are ideal for both new and professional painters. The paintbrush kit can be used for both indoor and outdoor paint jobs immediately after opening the package.
description: The original Cutting Edge Premium professional synthetic 6-Piece paintbrush set. A 6-piece brush set of the always-popular 2” paintbrush size. The ergonomic beavertail handle allows steady handling, you won’t need masking tape when you use Cutting Edge! Manufactured using the highest quality SRT (Solid Round Tapered) synthetic fibres. These paint brushes don’t need ‘breaking in’, as they work perfectly straight out of the box, unlike traditional brushes. With a stainless-steel ferrule and an ergonomically-shaped handle for a comfortable fit in your hand. Ideal for straight line tracing and smooth paint finishes. Tried, tested and trusted by professional decorators around the UK, the Cutting Edge paint brush set range gives you a great finish every time.
